channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "He Is In There": Venezuelan Woman Digs For Missing Son With Bare Hands

media:content.media:description: Ruined buildings and shell-shocked faces were everywhere.

item.description: Rescue teams and volunteers climbed heaps of ruins that used to be buildings as tall as 15 stories, screaming out the names of the missing.
item.content:encoded: Rescue teams and volunteers climbed heaps of ruins that used to be buildings as tall as 15 stories, screaming out the names of the missing.

item.title: King Charles Paid $40 Million In Taxes Over 3 Years. A Look At His Income

media:content.media:description: King Charles is the head of the Commonwealth.

item.description: King Charles III paid 11.7 million pound ($15.45 million) in personal taxes in 2023-24 and 12.9 million pound ($17.04 million) in 2024-25.
item.content:encoded: King Charles III paid 11.7 million pound ($15.45 million) in personal taxes in 2023-24 and 12.9 million pound ($17.04 million) in 2024-25.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Iran Peace Process Needs A New Architect, And India Shouldn't Waste Its Chance
item.description: Most leaders in the West have all experienced a sharp drop in popularity owing to economic and geopolitical uncertainty. For Delhi, this might be the time to cash in on its multi-alignment framework and cement its place at the high table.
item.content:encoded: Most leaders in the West have all experienced a sharp drop in popularity owing to economic and geopolitical uncertainty. For Delhi, this might be the time to cash in on its multi-alignment framework and cement its place at the high table.

item.title: What Is A Doublet? The Science Behind Venezuela's Twin Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: The deadly one-two punch toppled buildings in Venezuela's capital, Caracas.

item.description: While not as common as a typical earthquake where a main shock is followed by much smaller aftershocks, doublets can happen anywhere in the world.
item.content:encoded: While not as common as a typical earthquake where a main shock is followed by much smaller aftershocks, doublets can happen anywhere in the world.

item.title: US Plans AI Push To Speed Up Visa Processing

media:content.media:description: The first AI-enabled platform would become operational within 30 days.

item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) was modernising the immigration system to make legal migration faster while maintaining stricter security screening.
item.content:encoded: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) was modernising the immigration system to make legal migration faster while maintaining stricter security screening.

item.title: Iran Proposes $40 Billion Plan To Charge Ships In Hormuz Amid Trade Concerns

media:content.media:description: Iran and US agreed to a 60-day deal to ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz

item.description: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with nearly a fifth of global oil supplies passing through it every day.
item.content:encoded: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most important shipping routes, with nearly a fifth of global oil supplies passing through it every day.

item.title: Architecture, Lifestyle: What Europe Can Learn From Gulf's Heat Survival

media:content.media:description: Gulf inhabitants maximise their daily routines to avoid the hottest parts of the day.

item.description: The Gulf's futuristic cities have developed in the era of air conditioning, but traditional building styles were developed to maximise natural cooling effects.
item.content:encoded: The Gulf's futuristic cities have developed in the era of air conditioning, but traditional building styles were developed to maximise natural cooling effects.

item.title: 235 Dead In Venezuela Earthquakes, What We Know About Foreign Victims

media:content.media:description: The injured were pulled out covered in dust and blood, among them children and animals

item.description: The 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes that struck Wednesday evening was among the strongest in Venezuela in more than a century and was felt throughout the region.
item.content:encoded: The 7.2- and 7.5-magnitude earthquakes that struck Wednesday evening was among the strongest in Venezuela in more than a century and was felt throughout the region.

item.title: Florida Executes 74-Year-Old Murder Convict, Oldest In State's Modern History

media:content.media:description: Dusty Ray Spencer was pronounced dead at 6:10 pm following a three-drug injection at Florida State Prison

item.description: Another 74-year-old Florida inmate, Dennis Sochor, is scheduled to be executed on July 14.
item.content:encoded: Another 74-year-old Florida inmate, Dennis Sochor, is scheduled to be executed on July 14.

item.title: "Meet Your Next Budget Director": JD Vance On Wife Usha's $8 Maternity Dress

media:content.media:description: Usha Vance wore the dress during a Father's Day special episode of her YouTube series.

item.description: JD Vance's comment came after Usha Vance mocked a New York Times report that attached political significance to her $8.75 coral maternity dress from Old Navy.
item.content:encoded: JD Vance's comment came after Usha Vance mocked a New York Times report that attached political significance to her $8.75 coral maternity dress from Old Navy.

item.title: Trump Tightens Grip On AI, Asks OpenAI To Limit GPT-5.6 Release

media:content.media:description: The US government has asked OpenAI to release GPT-5.6 to a short list of trusted partners.

item.description: Anthropic previously said it believes the US government issued the order after discovering that it's possible to bypass the guardrails of Fable 5.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic previously said it believes the US government issued the order after discovering that it's possible to bypass the guardrails of Fable 5.

item.title: Pentagon Sees Bigger Role For AI In Setting Military Targets

media:content.media:description: The controversial new vision is included in a new chapter on the future of targeting.

item.description: The revised targeting guidance is the latest example of the Pentagon's rush to accelerate adoption of AI, a technology that is already transforming battlefields in conflicts around the world.
item.content:encoded: The revised targeting guidance is the latest example of the Pentagon's rush to accelerate adoption of AI, a technology that is already transforming battlefields in conflicts around the world.

item.title: Ship Attack In Strait Of Hormuz Halts UN Evacuation Plan For Trapped Sailors

media:content.media:description: Iran imposed a blockade of the strait during the war, sparking a global economic shock

item.description: The New York Times and other US media reported that Iran struck a container ship in the strait, and the Iranian agency that claims to regulate traffic there issued a warning after the incident.
item.content:encoded: The New York Times and other US media reported that Iran struck a container ship in the strait, and the Iranian agency that claims to regulate traffic there issued a warning after the incident.

item.title: How Phone Alerts Warn Millions Seconds Before Earthquakes

media:content.media:description: Some people in Venezuela received warnings seconds or even minutes before the shaking began

item.description: Several countries have Early Earthquake Warnings, including the United States, Mexico, Japan, Turkey, Romania, China, Italy and Taiwan, according to the US Geological Survey.
item.content:encoded: Several countries have Early Earthquake Warnings, including the United States, Mexico, Japan, Turkey, Romania, China, Italy and Taiwan, according to the US Geological Survey.

item.title: Ukraine Launches 'TrophyLab' Website To Catalogue Captured Russian Weapons

media:content.media:description: TrophyLab provides verified users access to an information platform dedicated to modern Russian weapons.

item.description: Ukraine has launched TrophyLab, a database containing detailed technical information on captured Russian weapons, allowing approved Ukrainian experts and international partners to study the technology.
item.content:encoded: Ukraine has launched TrophyLab, a database containing detailed technical information on captured Russian weapons, allowing approved Ukrainian experts and international partners to study the technology.

item.title: In A First For UK Monarch, King Charles Reveals Tax Bill, $40 Million

media:content.media:description: The palace, which had confirmed at the weekend that it would make the unprecedented release.

item.description: UK monarchs are legally exempt from paying certain taxes, though they have paid some duties voluntarily for decades, and they also have no obligation to disclose their private tax bills.
item.content:encoded: UK monarchs are legally exempt from paying certain taxes, though they have paid some duties voluntarily for decades, and they also have no obligation to disclose their private tax bills.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Kill 235, Over 1,500 Injured

media:content.media:description: An Italian and a Portuguese citizen were among the dead, officials from both countries confirmed

item.description: More than 1,500 people were injured as the earth shook and roared in what many Venezuelans called a terrifying display of nature's raw power.
item.content:encoded: More than 1,500 people were injured as the earth shook and roared in what many Venezuelans called a terrifying display of nature's raw power.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: 235 Killed, Over 1,500 Injured In Venezuela Earthquakes, Rescue Ops On

media:content.media:description: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake in Venezuela Updates: The first earthquake had a magnitude of 7.2

item.description: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela earthquake LIVE Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.

item.title: Kim Jong Un Watches Weapons Tests, Calls For "Destructive" Military Posture

media:content.media:description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un observed major weapons tests on Wednesday.

item.description: On Tuesday, North Korea commissioned the 5,000-ton destroyer that Kim touted as a symbol of the country's growing naval and nuclear capabilities.
item.content:encoded: On Tuesday, North Korea commissioned the 5,000-ton destroyer that Kim touted as a symbol of the country's growing naval and nuclear capabilities.

item.title: Hospitals Raise Alert As Europe Grapples With Unprecedented Heatwave

media:content.media:description: A nurse prepares a rehydration drip at Purpan Hospital as France experiences a heatwave.

item.description: At least 101 million Europeans faced temperatures of over 35C, with scores of people thought to have been killed by the record-breaking heatwave.
item.content:encoded: At least 101 million Europeans faced temperatures of over 35C, with scores of people thought to have been killed by the record-breaking heatwave.
